supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -267.56, and worst fold rw_009 net PnL -38.51.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 59.18 total net PnL across 8 better and 1 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.
